bullets: Developed and maintained backend features using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Redis across multiple modules of an internal HR platform, following structured Agile sprint workflows and production Git practices
Implemented JWT authentication and role-based access control while clearing all CI/CD quality gates — ESLint, Semgrep, and Danger.js — on every merged contribution via GitHub Actions preflight checks

Built a real-time messenger system using Socket.io v4 with Redis pub/sub, supporting multi-window cross-tab sync, DM and group conversations, and a floating Quick Chat widget with popout window via BroadcastChannel

Architected and shipped a production MERN stack service management platform for 400+ service centres across 5 states, featuring JWT-based multi-role auth, a 5-step complaint wizard, and automated WhatsApp notifications via the Meta API
Engineered a product tracking module with serial-number lookup and 3-year auto warranty calculation
